title: Anyscale
description: Scale your Chat, Player List (TAB), Scoreboard (Sidebar), Inventories (including chests) and your hotbar, to any fractional value!
body:
## Anyscale
Anyscale lets you set any value between 0.00 and 5.00 (in increments of 0.05) as your scale for:
- Base GUI scale
- Player list (TAB)
- Any inventory (chests, barrels, hoppers, etc...)
- The sidebar scoreboard
- Chat
- Hotbar (XP Bar, Mount Jump Bar, Health, Food, Mount Health, Armor, Air remaining)
  - [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) compatibility
- ~~Crosshair~~
- ~~Selected Item Tooltip~~

It integrates into **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)** (and [Reeses Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)), making it's own category. 

The mod is completely **client side** and does nothing when installed on the server.
